answer:
External 
/ – These are written in separate files. Internal – These are cited at the top of the web page code document. Inline – These are written right next to the text

text: display inline vs inline-block vs block
answer:
inline - without new line, width=content, without height 
 inline-block - without new line, width=content, with height 
 block - start with new line, width=100%, with height
